title: Continuous Environment Background AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: ultra-wide continuous environment background built around quiet Kyoto cafe storefront row. Subject: continuous wooden cafe facades with sliding doors, noren curtains, window displays, lanterns, and entrance mats forms the practical hero content, with every storefront or facade module readable. Scene: quiet Kyoto cafe storefront row appears during soft spring morning after light rain, supported by paper lanterns, bicycles, potted maples, wet stone path, small stools, and two distant pedestrians as small-scale street-life detail. Composition: Fixed horizontal 3:1 panoramic composition, straight-on eye-level view, one uninterrupted row of facades extending across the frame. Style: Practical environment concept art for scene design, with realistic street-life detail, clean facade information, and continuous background-board clarity. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: No unnecessary text; any incidental labels stay minimal, intentional, and secondary to the image. Signature Elements: quiet Kyoto cafe storefront row, soft spring morning after light rain, continuous wooden cafe facades with sliding doors, noren curtains, window displays, lanterns, and entrance mats, and paper lanterns, bicycles, potted maples, wet stone path, small stools, and two distant pedestrians define the reusable environment-background mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Continuous Environment Background Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: ultra-wide continuous environment background built around Mediterranean seaside bakery storefront row. Subject: continuous pastel bakery and cafe facades with awnings, display windows, open doors, balconies, and tiled steps forms the practical hero content, with every storefront or facade module readable. Scene: Mediterranean seaside bakery storefront row appears during late afternoon golden light with sea breeze, supported by striped awnings, bread baskets, scooters, potted lemons, chalk menus, seagull shadows, and tiny visitors as small-scale street-life detail. Composition: Fixed horizontal 3:1 panoramic composition, straight-on eye-level view, one uninterrupted row of facades extending across the frame. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
